title: Verify Subsidiary Claim Response
description: The brand-agent's authoritative answer to whether the claimed brand is a subsidiary of this house. Always returns a `status`; richer fields are gated by caller authorization.

status.description: Verification status. Applicable values for this tool: owned, pending_review, disputed, not_ours, unknown. (licensed_in / licensed_out do not apply to subsidiaries.)

brand_id.description: Public — the house's brand_id for this subsidiary when status is `owned` or `pending_review`. Lets the caller cross-reference with brand_refs[] / brands[] entries.

first_observed_by_house_at.description: Authorized-tier only. When the house first became aware of this claim (whether via this RPC, an inbound notification, or its own discovery).

expected_resolution_window_days.description: Authorized-tier only. The house's expected window for resolving a `pending_review` claim. Aggregate signal, not a guarantee; does not expose queue position or internal operations.

dispute_reason.description: Public — when status is `disputed`, a short human-readable rationale (e.g., 'Trademark conflict; not affiliated'). May be empty even on disputed.
